ddls:
CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the telescope or observatory where the data was collected */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category of the data */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of data collection method */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the frequency of data collection */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year(s) the data was collected */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data (e.g., F3pl) */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the dataset */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date when the version was created */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Measure of the quality of the data */,
  "data_size" REAL /* Size of the dataset in MB */,
  "data_source" TEXT /* Detailed source of the data (e.g., specific instrument or project) */,
  "data_license" TEXT /* License under which the data is shared */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data (e.g., FITS, CSV) */,
  "data_compression" TEXT /* Compression method used for the data file */,
  "data_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "data_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "data_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the dataset */,
  "data_file" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "readme_file" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES data_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_telescope_id FOREIGN KEY ("telescope_id") REFERENCES telescopes ("telescope_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_datasets_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "telescopes" (
  "telescope_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each telescope or observatory */,
  "telescope_name" TEXT /* Name of the telescope or observatory */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the telescope or observatory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the telescope or observatory */,
  "telescope_type" TEXT /* Type of telescope (e.g., optical, radio) */,
  "telescope_diameter" REAL /* Diameter of the telescope in meters */,
  "telescope_focal_length" REAL /* Focal length of the telescope in meters */,
  "telescope_resolution" REAL /* Resolution of the telescope in arcseconds */,
  "telescope_sensitivity" TEXT /* Sensitivity of the telescope */,
  "telescope_instrumentation" TEXT /* List of instruments used with the telescope */,
  "telescope_coordinates" TEXT /* Geographical coordinates of the telescope */,
  "telescope_elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the telescope above sea level */,
  "telescope_first_light" TEXT /* Date of the first light of the telescope */,
  "telescope_last_update" TEXT /* Date of the last update or maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("telescope_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "category_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "category_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the data type (e.g., CCD, photometry) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data type */,
  "type_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "type_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_name" TEXT /* Name of the frequency (e.g., daily, weekly) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "frequency_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "frequency_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year(s) the data was collected */,
  "year_start" TEXT /* Start year of the data collection */,
  "year_end" TEXT /* End year of the data collection */,
  "year_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "year_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the data file */,
  "file_compression" TEXT /* Compression method used for the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "file_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_format" TEXT /* Format of the readme file */,
  "file_compression" TEXT /* Compression method used for the file */,
  "file_checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure file integrity */,
  "file_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "file_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the file */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "user_department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  "user_affiliation" TEXT /* Affiliation of the user (e.g., university, institution) */,
  "user_position" TEXT /* Position of the user (e.g., professor, student) */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_last_login" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the dataset */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the dataset was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "access_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fpl_values" (
  "fpl_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each FPL value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the FPL value belongs to */,
  "fpl_value" REAL /* FPL value */,
  "fpl_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "fpl_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the FPL value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fpl_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fpl_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "tcal_values" (
  "tcal_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each TCAL value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the TCAL value belongs to */,
  "tcal_left" REAL /* Left TCAL value */,
  "tcal_right" REAL /* Right TCAL value */,
  "tcal_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "tcal_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the TCAL value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tcal_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_tcal_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "qped_values" (
  "qped_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each QPED value */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* ID of the dataset the QPED value belongs to */,
  "qped_left" REAL /* Left QPED value */,
  "qped_right" REAL /* Right QPED value */,
  "qped_keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for advanced search and filtering */,
  "qped_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the QPED value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("qped_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_qped_values_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)
